articles.title: U.S. Marshals arrest 2 alleged fugitives weeks after mass shooting in Blue Hill Avenue
articles.description:
The two Boston men face charges of assault to murder and assault and battery with a dangerous weapon, court records show.

The post U.S. Marshals arrest 2 alleged fugitives weeks after mass shooting in Blue Hill Avenue appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. Marshals arrested two Boston men linked to a recent Blue Hill Avenue mass shooting.
The suspects face charges of assault to murder and assault with a dangerous weapon.
These arrests aim to enhance public safety in Boston following the violent incident.

articles.title: Mass. is seeing ‘normal’ levels in cases of the explosive diarrhea parasite despite Midwestern outbreak, DPH says
articles.description:
State officials say the next update of reported cases — which currently sits at 18 from May 1 to July 1 — will be available in the first week of August.

The post Mass. is seeing ‘normal’ levels in cases of the explosive diarrhea parasite despite Midwestern outbreak, DPH says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts reports 18 cases of explosive diarrhea parasite from May 1 to July 1.
State officials will provide the next update on cases in the first week of August.
Boston residents currently face no increased risk despite a Midwestern outbreak.

articles.title: Vance says Trump administration ‘screwed up’ communications around Epstein files
articles.description:
During a podcast interview with Joe Rogan, Vance pointed largely to former Attorney General Pam Bondi, who infamously stated that an alleged “client list” of Epstein’s was “sitting on my desk right now.”

The post Vance says Trump administration ‘screwed up’ communications around Epstein files appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Vance criticized the Trump administration's handling of Epstein files during a Joe Rogan podcast.
Former Attorney General Pam Bondi claimed an Epstein client list was on her desk.
Boston residents may see renewed scrutiny on Epstein-related cases due to these revelations.
